stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What weather phenomena can be expected when flying from Perth (32°S 116°E) to Melbourne (38°S 144°E) at FL250?

options.a: Individual thunderstorms with hail and moderate or severe turbulence and ice.
options.b: North-westerly winds of around 100 kt and associated moderate CAT.
options.c: There are NO dangerous phenomena at this FL.
